content:
# Session 23 (iter-023) вЂ” summary

**Milestone: S3 zero-carrier bridge FULLY CLOSED.** OcOfD cone 2 в†’ 0 (only off-cone
`sheafOf_singlePoint_iso` L772 remains). Both closed decls axiom-clean
(`propext`/`Classical.choice`/`Quot.sound`, no `sorryAx`); `lake build
AlgebraicJacobian.RiemannRoch.OcOfD` в†’ 8338 jobs, success. sync_leanok iter=23 +46/в€’0.

- Sorry count (OcOfD): before 3 (L772 off-cone, L2370 gluing, L2454 naturality) в†’ after 1 (L772).
- 1 lane: `OcOfD.lean` (the planned final 2-sorry S3 chain). Both closed.

## Target 1 вЂ” `exists_section_of_mem_carrierSubmoduleSheaf_zero` (was L2370) вЂ” SOLVED
Hartshorne II.6.3A affine-cover amalgamation.
- `f = 0` в†’ `s = 0`. Else extract `hord : в€Ђ Qв€€U, 0 в‰¤ ord_Q f` from `(Submodule.mem_inf.mp hf).1`.
- Cover `О№ := {W // IsAffineOpen W в€§ Nonempty W в€§ W в‰¤ U}` (affine opens are a basis:
  `isBasis_affineOpens` + `Opens.isBasis_iff_nbhd`). Per-piece sections from the affine arm
  `exists_section_of_forall_order_nonneg_affineOpen`.
- **Compatibility is FREE**: the irreducible curve's generic point lies in every nonempty open
  (`genericPoint_spec вЂ¦ mem_open_set_iff`), so every overlap is nonempty; `germToFunctionField_injective`
  + `germ_res_apply` reduce both restrictions to the common value `f`. No empty-overlap case.
- Glue via `C.left.sheaf.existsUnique_gluing'`; identify glued germ via an affine nbhd of the generic point.
- **Errors hit**: `failed to synthesize Nonempty в†Ґв†‘(Ufam i)` (coercion `в†Ґ` vs `в†Ґв†‘`) вЂ” fixed by registering
  a Pi-instance `haveI : в€Ђ i, Nonempty (Ufam i)` *before* stating `hsec`. `Min (Type u)` on
  `Nonempty (Ufam i вЉ“ Ufam j)` вЂ” fixed by annotating the meet `(вЂ¦ : C.left.Opens)`.

## Target 2 вЂ” `carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` naturality (was L2454) вЂ” SOLVED
- Kept `NatIso.ofComponents (fun U => carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf U)`; discharged the
  naturality square with two new value-characterisation helpers `_inv_coe` / `_hom_coe`.
- `вЉҐ` target: codomain `О“(вЉҐ,рќ’Є)` terminal в†’ `IsTerminal.hom_ext`. Nonempty target (`Yв‰ вЉҐвџ№Xв‰ вЉҐ` since `Yв‰¤X`):
  `ModuleCat.hom_ext` + `LinearMap.ext`, then `germToFunctionField_injective` reduces to a `K(C)`-value
  equality; both composites are the identity on the underlying rational function.
- **The planner's "build a fresh forward morphism and invert" was UNNECESSARY** вЂ” reusing the existing
  component iso with the two `_coe` helpers worked.
- **Errors hit**: `Nonempty в†Ґв†‘(Opposite.unop Y)` synth failure (same coercion trap) вЂ” fixed by passing the
  instance explicitly (`@Scheme.germToFunctionField_injective C.left _ Y.unop hYne'`) or
  `Set.Nonempty.to_subtype`. `rw` of `_coe` helpers fails on syntactic mismatch (`.val` vs
  `sheafToPresheaf.obj`; `CommRingCat.Hom.hom` vs `ConcreteCategory.hom`) вЂ” fixed with
  `have hL/hR := lemma вЂ¦; exact hL.trans hR.symm` (`exact` checks up to defeq, sidesteps syntactic `rw`).

## New helpers (axiom-clean, used only inside the naturality proof)
- `carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf_inv_coe` (~L2496): for `Uв‰ вЉҐ`,
  `((comp U).inv.hom s).val = germToFunctionField U.unop s`. Proof: `unfold` + `dif_neg`.
- `carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf_hom_coe` (~L2516): for `Uв‰ вЉҐ`,
  `germToFunctionField U.unop ((comp U).hom.hom y) = y.val`. Proof: `_inv_coe` + `Iso.hom_inv_id`.
Both lack a blueprint entry в†’ coverage debt (see recommendations).

## Key findings / reusable patterns
- **Irreducibility kills sheaf-gluing compatibility**: on an irreducible scheme the generic point is in every
  nonempty open, so any cover by nonempty opens has all overlaps nonempty and `germToFunctionField_injective`
  collapses every compatibility check to a single function-field value. No empty-overlap bookkeeping.
- **Coercion trap `Nonempty в†Ґв†‘U` vs `Nonempty в†ҐU`**: `germToFunctionField` & friends want the Set-coe form
  `в†Ґв†‘U`; `[Nonempty U.unop]`/`haveI` give the Opens-coe form `в†ҐU`; instance synthesis does NOT bridge.
  Pass the instance explicitly (`@вЂ¦`, `(h := вЂ¦)`) or `Set.Nonempty.to_subtype`.
- **`exact вЂ¦ .trans вЂ¦ .symm` over `rw`** when helper LHS/RHS differ only by coercion presentation
  (`.val` vs `sheafToPresheaf.obj`): `rw` fails on the syntactic mismatch, `exact` succeeds via defeq.
- `germ_res_apply` is the applied form of `germ_res'` вЂ” avoids `congrArg`/`comp_apply` bookkeeping.

## Review subagents (2 dispatched, 0 must-fix)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker/ocofd**: PASS, 0 must-fix. Both closed decls match the chapter route with correct
  signatures, sorry-free; `lem:carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf` prose consistent with closed state.
  Minors: 2-helper coverage debt; 2 stale in-file comments (L2258вЂ“2264, L2158вЂ“2163 understate completion).
- **lean-auditor/iter023**: 0 critical / 7 major / 1 minor. Proofs genuinely sorry-free; exactly 1 honest fenced
  sorry (L772). 7 majors = STALE STATUS DOCSTRINGS (module header, `sheafOf` body docstring,
  `cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper` G1/G2/G3-pending claim, `sheafOf_ses_single_add` docstring+inline,
  `exists_section_of_forall_order_nonneg_affineOpen` "left as focused sorry" note) вЂ” all comment-only describing
  resolved prior-iter states; route to next OcOfD prover (review cannot edit `.lean`). Reports:
  `.archon/task_results/lean-auditor-iter023.md`, `.archon/task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-ocofd.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex`, `lem:carrierSheaf_zero_sections_eq_structureSheaf`: replaced the stale iter-022
  `% NOTE` (claimed gluing step still `sorry`) with an iter-023 CLOSED note (both gluing + naturality now
  sorry-free). Within `% NOTE:` marker domain.
- No `\leanok` override: sync_leanok iter=23 added 46 markers; the bridge decls are correctly marked. No
  `\mathlibok` / `\lean{}` rename owed.

## Recommendations (next iter)
S3 closes the `рќ’Є_C(D)` substrate of headline #1. **S2 (Serre/ДЊech finiteness) opens as ONE from-scratch
phase** вЂ” `SerreFiniteness.lean` does not exist; the Grothendieck H^{в‰Ґ2}=0 gate (`lem:grothendieck_vanishing_curve`,
no `\lean`) is entangled with the ДЊech crux (2-affine cover в‡’ degrees {0,1} в‡’ H^{в‰Ґ2}=0 free from the same
ДЊech=derived comparison). Needs a blueprint-writer round + strategy-auditor before any prover. See recommendations.md.
